migration_apply_status: FILE COMMITTED TO BRANCH — NOT YET APPLIED TO SUPABASE PRODUCTION. Supabase MCP tool was not available in this environment. Migration must be applied by coordinator via: Supabase Dashboard → SQL Editor, or MCP apply_migration tool in a session that has it. SQL is in supabase/migrations/0204_receipt_lines.sql.

grounding_checkpoint_required: Upload a real receipt image via /receipts → Upload tab. Verify OCR extraction returns correct vendor, date, and total within $0.01 of the printed amount.
Trigger gmail-scan manually via POST /api/receipts/gmail-scan with the CRON_SECRET header. Verify it reads Gmail creds from harness_config and does not error on missing bank_transactions table.
Navigate to /receipts cockpit page in production. Verify all 4 tabs render without JavaScript errors. Verify SummaryStrip shows correct counts after uploading a test receipt.

Verify migration 0204 has been applied to Supabase production (coordinator must apply it before grounding). Check: SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name IN ('receipt_lines','receipt_matches');
unknowns: Migration 0204 not applied to Supabase production — Supabase MCP tool unavailable in this builder session. Coordinator must apply before grounding checkpoint 4 above.

Gmail cron cannot be added to vercel.json (already at 18-cron Vercel Hobby limit). Coordinator must decide: (a) remove an existing cron to make room, (b) promote to paid plan, or (c) leave Gmail scan as manual-trigger only. EmailImportTab UI has a 'Scan Now' button that calls the route manually.

bank_transactions table does not exist. receipt_matches.transaction_id stored as TEXT. When bank_transactions migration lands, coordinator should add the FK constraint documented in the migration comments.

tests/architecture/api-auth-coverage.test.ts was already failing before this task (pre-existing: many routes use createServiceClient + requireUser but the test's heuristic only looks for auth.getUser() or requireCronSecret). My 5 new routes add to the detected violations but did not introduce the failure. Coordinator should track this as a separate debt item.
next_chunk_blockers: Migration 0204 must be applied to Supabase production before any route that writes to receipt_lines or receipt_matches will work.
